about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Helping you find your perfect match
about.story: Singles.in.UB was founded in 2019 in Ulaanbaatar with a simple mission: to provide Mongolian singles with a serious, respectful way to find love.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To create a personalized matchmaking service that truly understands and serves Mongolian people.

items.title: Serious Intent
items.desc: We only serve people looking for genuine relationships.

items.title: Privacy
items.desc: Your information is completely confidential and secure.

items.title: Personal Attention
items.desc: Human judgment, not algorithms. Tailored for you.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to meet your match

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Fill out our online application. No photo required — we start with who you are. Your information is completely confidential.

steps.title: Get Matched
steps.description: Our experts hand-select compatible matches based on your personality and what you're looking for.

steps.title: Meet
steps.description: Meet your match in a safe, comfortable environment. Take the first step — let history do the rest.

apply.title: Apply
apply.subtitle: Take the first step to meet your match
apply.privacy: No photo required • Your information stays private
